items.title: Mission Drishti Successfully Launched
items.whyInNews: Union Home and Cooperation Minister Shri Amit Shah congratulated the scientists and engineers of GalaxEye on the successful construction of Mission Drishti on May 4, 2026.
items.summary: Mission Drishti was successfully launched, marking a significant achievement in India's space programme. The mission was constructed by GalaxEye, a private space company. Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi congratulated GalaxEye on the successful launch of Mission Drishti.

items.title: Agni Suraksha Saptah to be Observed from May 4 to 10, 2026
items.whyInNews: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare will observe Agni Suraksha Saptah from May 4 to 10, 2026, to raise awareness about fire safety.
items.summary: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare will observe Agni Suraksha Saptah from May 4 to 10, 2026. The initiative aims to raise awareness about fire safety and prevent fire-related accidents. The ministry will organize various events and activities during the week to promote fire safety.

items.title: North Tech Symposium to be Held in Prayagraj
items.whyInNews: The Defence Minister will inaugurate the 3-day North Tech Symposium in Prayagraj, which will be jointly organized by the Indian Army and SIDM.
items.summary: The Defence Minister will inaugurate the 3-day North Tech Symposium in Prayagraj, which will be jointly organized by the Indian Army and the Society of Indian Defence Manufacturers (SIDM). The symposium will focus on emerging technologies and innovations in the defence sector. The event will provide a platform for industry leaders, academia, and defence personnel to discuss and showcase new technologies.

items.title: India-Kambodia Joint Military Exercise to be Held

items.title: Panchayat Development Schemes for 2026-27 to be Discussed

items.summary: A two-day national workshop will be held in New Delhi to discuss the preparation of Panchayat development schemes for 2026-27. The workshop will be attended by officials from the Ministry of Panchayati Raj and state governments. items.title: National Guidelines for Childhood Diabetes Released

items.summary: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare released national guidelines for childhood diabetes. items.title: India-Jamaica Ties Characterised by Continuity and Change
items.whyInNews: Indian External Affairs Minister, S. Jaishankar, stated that India-Jamaica ties are characterised by continuity and change in an interview with The Jamaican Gleaner on May 3, 2026.
items.summary: S. Jaishankar, the Indian External Affairs Minister, discussed the India-Jamaica relationship, highlighting its evolution over time. He emphasized the need for both countries to work together to build a deeper partnership. The minister's statement comes as India seeks to strengthen its ties with countries in the Caribbean region. India and Jamaica have a long history of cooperation, with both nations being members of the Commonwealth.

items.title: Man United Beats Liverpool 3-2
items.whyInNews: Manchester United defeated Liverpool 3-2 on May 3, 2026, securing a spot in the Champions League after a two-year absence.
items.summary: Manchester United's 3-2 win over Liverpool on May 3, 2026, marked a significant milestone for the team, as they secured a spot in the Champions League. The match was closely contested, with both teams creating scoring opportunities. Manchester United's victory comes as a relief to the team's fans, who have been waiting for the team to return to the Champions League. The win is a testament to the team's hard work and dedication.

items.title: Antonelli Takes Third Win in a Row for Mercedes

Antonelli's win is also a significant achievement for the young driver, who is making a name for himself in the sport.
